title: LEGASI YZ
shortDesc: Landing page design with focus on minimalist aesthetic.
fullDesc: A high-performance landing page built for Legasi YZ. Focuses on minimal aesthetics and fast loading speeds using Next.js and GSAP for smooth animations.

title: EXPENSE SPLITTER APP
fullDesc: A comprehensive full-stack financial tool designed to simplify group expenses. It features an automated debt-balancing algorithm that settles complex IOUs efficiently, integrated with real-time data synchronization and a clean, user-centric interface for tracking shared costs among friends or housemates.

title: UI/UX DESIGN PORTFOLIO
shortDesc: A modern UI/UX design portfolio showcasing creative work.
fullDesc: Full-stack mobile application that allows users to track their daily expenses with real-time data visualization.
